title: sweech init asks "add another?" after first profile
description: Onboarding ends abruptly after one profile. Users with multiple accounts must exit and re-run sweech add.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "init asks add another? after first profile"

acceptanceCriteria: After first profile is saved, prompt "Add another? (y/N)" — N exits cleanly
Y loops back to the profile-add step
Hint at the end: "Run sweech anytime to launch a workspace"
